title: Marbella Motor Yacht Hire: Costs, Seasons and Best Boats 2026
html:
Motor yacht hire in Marbella offers a luxurious way to explore the Costa del Sol, with departures from Puerto Banús and prices starting at around 450 EUR for a half-day charter. Whether you want to cruise the coast or anchor at a chic beach club, BoatHire24 connects you with verified owners for a seamless booking experience.

How much does it cost to rent a motor yacht in Marbella?

A half-day charter on a 40-foot motor yacht starts at about 450 EUR, while a full-day crewed experience on a larger vessel can reach 3,000 EUR or more. Prices vary by boat size, season, and added services like a skipper or catering. For an accurate comparison, browse boat rental Marbella options on BoatHire24 to see real-time availability and rates.

Where to set off in Marbella

Most motor yacht charters depart from Puerto Banús, the glamorous marina known for its designer boutiques and superyachts. Alternatively, Puerto Deportivo de Marbella (the main harbour) offers a more relaxed base. From either, you can head to Playa de la Fontanilla for a quick swim or cruise south to La Concha viewpoint. For a longer trip, sail to the exclusive Club del Mar in San Pedro Alcántara or anchor off the coast of Málaga city, about 30 nautical miles away.

Which boat to rent

  1. Princess V58, a sporty flybridge cruiser for up to 12 guests, from 1,200 EUR for a full day. See the Princess V58 listing on BoatHire24 for details.
  2. Sunseeker Predator 63, a stylish open motor yacht for 10 guests, from 1,500 EUR per day.
  3. Azimut 55, a comfortable flybridge with three cabins, ideal for 10 guests, from 1,000 EUR half-day.
  4. Fairline 45 Squadron, a classic cruiser for 8 guests, from 800 EUR half-day.
  5. Axopar 37, a versatile sport boat for 6 guests, from 450 EUR half-day.

Cost breakdown: budget-friendly to luxury

  • Shared group tour on a motorboat: from 80 EUR per person for a two-hour trip.
  • Small motorboat (e.g. Axopar 37) half-day bareboat: 450 EUR.
  • Catamaran full-day crewed for 12 guests: 2,000 EUR.
  • Crewed luxury motor yacht full-day for 10 guests: 2,500, 3,000 EUR.

When to go and do you need a licence?

The high season runs from June to September, when the heat is tempered by the Poniente wind and demand peaks. In spring and autumn the weather is still pleasant, with lower prices. Most motor yachts available through BoatHire24 come with a licensed skipper, so no separate licence is needed for charter. For bareboat rentals, a valid ICC or equivalent is typically required; the operator confirms exact requirements before booking.

If you charter in September, the sea is still warm and anchorages like Piedra Paloma are less crowded than in August.

At a glance

  • Price band: 80, 3,000 EUR per trip
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: half-day (4 hours) or full-day (8 hours)
  • Max guests: 12 on most crewed yachts
  • Currency: Euro

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can I rent a motor yacht for a week in Marbella?

Yes, weekly charters are available on boats like the Princess V58, with prices starting around 7,000 EUR for seven days in low season.

Is food and drink included in the charter price?

Crewed charters often include a welcome drink and can arrange catering at an extra cost; check the listing details on BoatHire24.

What is the cancellation policy?

Individual owners set their own policies, but many offer free cancellation up to 14 days before departure.

Whether you are planning a family outing or a business event, motor yacht hire in Marbella delivers an unforgettable day on the Mediterranean. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Marbella or list your own. Start exploring verified boats today at BoatHire24.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
